def compute_factor(df: pl.DataFrame) -> pl.Series:
    # Sort by (code, date) to ensure correct time-series per-code ordering
    df = df.sort(['code', 'date'])

    # Compute lagged columns (1-period delay)
    high_lag1 = delay(pl.col('high'), periods=1)
    close_lag1 = delay(pl.col('close'), periods=1)
    low_lag1 = delay(pl.col('low'), periods=1)

    # Compute the three open-vs-lagged differences
    diff_high = pl.col('open') - high_lag1
    diff_close = pl.col('open') - close_lag1
    diff_low = pl.col('open') - low_lag1

    # Cross-sectional ranks per date
    r_high = rank(diff_high).over('date')
    r_close = rank(diff_close).over('date')
    r_low = rank(diff_low).over('date')

    # Combine: -1 * rank(open - delay(high,1)) * rank(open - delay(close,1)) * rank(open - delay(low,1))
    factor = -1 * r_high * r_close * r_low

    return df.select(factor).to_series()
